channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-18512] racer test_2: Timeout occurred after 478 minutes, last suite running was racer
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Artem Blagodarenko <ablagodarenko@ddn.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/f831d10b-706b-44ec-8783-82e01587adf6

test_2 failed with the following error:

Timeout occurred after 478 minutes, last suite running was racer

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/109356 - 4.18.0-553.27.1.el8_10.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/109356 - 4.18.0-553.27.1.el8_lustre.x86_64

trevis-26vm2: file_rm.sh: no process found
trevis-26vm2: dir_create.sh: no process found
trevis-26vm2: dir_remote.sh: no process found
trevis-26vm2: file_rename.sh: no process found

trevis-26vm2: file_create.sh: no process found
trevis-26vm2: file_rm.sh: no process found

trevis-26vm3: dir_remote.sh: no process found

trevis-26vm3: file_rename.sh: no process found
trevis-26vm3: file_create.sh: no process found
trevis-26vm3: file_rm.sh: no process found
Running /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer/racer.sh for 300 seconds. CTRL-C to exit

10.240.38.128@tcp:/lustre  61549280 62316  57997360   1% /mnt/lustre2
We survived /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer/racer.sh for 300 seconds.
there should be NO racer processes:

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
